---
title: "跨文本综合 / Cross-Text Synthesis"
subtitle: "10 篇旗舰综合文：每篇追踪一个 Omega 定理核穿过五部经典与 Gen 2 论文"
listing:
  - id: synthesis-essays
    contents: "essay-*.qmd"
    sort: "order"
    type: default
    fields: [title, subtitle, description]
---

## 这一层在做什么

这一层不再从单部经典出发，而是从 **一个 Omega 定理核** 出发，追踪它如何在《道德经》《易经》《黄帝内经》《孙子兵法》《几何原本》以及 Gen 2 论文中显现。

重点不是做古籍导读，而是确认同一个数学结构在不同文本中的出现方式，并清楚区分 `formal correspondence` 与 `metaphorical analogy`。

这一层的媒体默认策略是：**中文主叙事，英文辅助 rigor**。中文承担古籍传播与社交媒体适配，英文只承担 theorem names、关键术语和短 rigor summary。

**首批媒体已发布：**
- [01 No11 与知止之美 Slides](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_01_no11_golden_mean_shift_slides.pdf)
- [02 递推增长与由一而多 Slides](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_02_fibonacci_growth_recurrence_slides.pdf)
- [03 Fold：过量如何被折回稳定域 Slides](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_03_fold_operator_slides.pdf)

## 旗舰地图

| # | 文章 | 主定理核 | 覆盖经典 | 关联论文 | 状态 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 01 | [No11 与知止之美](essay-01-no11_golden_mean_shift.qmd) | `fibonacci_cardinality` | 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本 | [A Sharp Three-Window Threshold and Finite-Memory Conjugacy in Fibonacci Stabilization](../../science/gen2/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity.qmd)<br>[Finite-Window Rigidity in Fibonacci Numeration](../../science/gen2/resolution-folding-core-symbolic-dynamics.qmd) | 已发布 |
| 02 | [递推增长与由一而多](essay-02-fibonacci_growth_recurrence.qmd) | `fibonacci_cardinality_recurrence` | 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本 | [A Sharp Three-Window Threshold and Finite-Memory Conjugacy in Fibonacci Stabilization](../../science/gen2/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity.qmd)<br>[Finite-Window Rigidity in Fibonacci Numeration](../../science/gen2/resolution-folding-core-symbolic-dynamics.qmd) | 已发布 |
| 03 | [Fold：过量如何被折回稳定域](essay-03-fold_operator.qmd) | `fold_is_idempotent` | 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本 | [Finite-Window Rigidity in Fibonacci Numeration](../../science/gen2/resolution-folding-core-symbolic-dynamics.qmd)<br>[A Sharp Three-Window Threshold and Finite-Memory Conjugacy in Fibonacci Stabilization](../../science/gen2/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity.qmd) | 已发布 |
| 04 | [唯一稀疏分解与规范形](essay-04-zeckendorf_uniqueness.qmd) | `zeckendorf_uniqueness` | 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本 | [Canonical Zeckendorf Normalization and the Minimal Berstel Adder](../../science/gen2/zeckendorf-streaming-normalization-automata-rairo.qmd)<br>[Finite-Window Rigidity in Fibonacci Numeration](../../science/gen2/resolution-folding-core-symbolic-dynamics.qmd) | 已发布 |
| 05 | [逆极限与层级整体](essay-05-inverse_limit_modular_tower.qmd) | `inverse_limit_extensionality` | 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本 | [Shell Geometry from Stationary Detector Thermality in Static KMS Spacetimes](../../science/gen2/grg-shell-geometry-from-stationary-detector-thermality.qmd)<br>[A Sharp Three-Window Threshold and Finite-Memory Conjugacy in Fibonacci Stabilization](../../science/gen2/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity.qmd) | 已发布 |
| 06 | [主模态、兵势与脉象](essay-06-spectral_theory.qmd) | `goldenMeanAdjacency_has_goldenRatio_eigenvector` | 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本 | [Tilt Dynamics of Cylinder Information and the Parry Measure on the Golden-Mean Shift](../../science/gen2/zero-jitter-information-clocks-parry-gibbs-rigidity.qmd)<br>[A Sharp Three-Window Threshold and Finite-Memory Conjugacy in Fibonacci Stabilization](../../science/gen2/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity.qmd) | 已发布 |
| 07 | [最小公设、最少破坏与最优保真](essay-07-rate_distortion.qmd) | `scanError_hasCertificate` | 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本 | [Folded Histograms of Irrational Rotations: Sampling Certificates and Structural Mismatch to the Parry Measure](../../science/gen2/folded-rotation-histogram-certificates.qmd)<br>[Shell Geometry from Stationary Detector Thermality in Static KMS Spacetimes](../../science/gen2/grg-shell-geometry-from-stationary-detector-thermality.qmd) | 已发布 |
| 08 | [相生相克与稳定环](essay-08-ring_arithmetic.qmd) | `stableValue_ring_isomorphism` | 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本 | [Upper Fibers and Witness Covers for the Fibonacci Order-of-Apparition Map](../../science/gen2/fibonacci-moduli-cross-resolution-arithmetic.qmd)<br>[Finite-Window Rigidity in Fibonacci Numeration](../../science/gen2/resolution-folding-core-symbolic-dynamics.qmd) | 已发布 |
| 09 | [四时、反者道之动与势](essay-09-dynamical_systems.qmd) | `topological_entropy_eq_log_phi` | 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本 | [Tilt Dynamics of Cylinder Information and the Parry Measure on the Golden-Mean Shift](../../science/gen2/zero-jitter-information-clocks-parry-gibbs-rigidity.qmd)<br>[A Sharp Three-Window Threshold and Finite-Memory Conjugacy in Fibonacci Stabilization](../../science/gen2/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity.qmd) | 已发布 |
| 10 | [看不见的东西如何被看见](essay-10-fiber_scan_observation.qmd) | `observation_refinement_reduces_error` | 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本 | [Folded Histograms of Irrational Rotations: Sampling Certificates and Structural Mismatch to the Parry Measure](../../science/gen2/folded-rotation-histogram-certificates.qmd)<br>[Shell Geometry from Stationary Detector Thermality in Static KMS Spacetimes](../../science/gen2/grg-shell-geometry-from-stationary-detector-thermality.qmd) | 已发布 |

## Essays

:::{#synthesis-essays}
:::

---

[Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd) | [Back to Home](../../index.qmd)
